proposed_but_unused._comment: These 3 MechanicTypes were proposed in JOB-Y's 1989_final_fight.md essence-write and consolidated in catalog_proposals.md. They are NOT yet registered in mechanics/_registry.ts. The beat-em-up scaffold currently approximates them with the close-mappings noted; if main promotes these in a future framework pass, this scaffold can be tightened.

SideScrollBeatEmUpStage.currently_approximated_by: stage_wave_spawner (WaveSpawner) with `camera_advances_only_after_screen_clear: true` + brawler_camera_locked_forward (CameraFollow) with `lock_camera_x_on_screen_enter: true` — pair-of-mechanics gives equivalent screen-lock-clear-to-advance behavior.
SideScrollBeatEmUpStage.what_promotion_would_unlock: first-class side-scroll-stage primitive with single-param `length_pixels` + `screen_width_pixels` + `advance_on_clear_predicate` instead of 2-mechanic composition.

CoopSharedScreen.currently_approximated_by: brawler_camera_locked_forward.centroid_target_if_coop + brawler_hud.show_per_player_lives + characters.json#coop_config block. Gameplay works but coop-mode isn't a first-class mechanic.
CoopSharedScreen.what_promotion_would_unlock: dedicated CoopSharedScreen mechanic with declarative max_players + friendly_fire_toggle + per_player_credit_pool instead of scattered flags across 3 files.

ArcadeContinueTimer.currently_approximated_by: rules.json#continue_system (countdown on KO + consume-credit-to-continue) — equivalent behavior, but continues are declared as rules not a first-class mechanic.
ArcadeContinueTimer.what_promotion_would_unlock: ArcadeContinueTimer mechanic with countdown_seconds + continue_input + on_timeout_action params; one-line declare instead of rules-block.

SelfDamagingDesperation.currently_approximated_by: per-character `specials` block in moves.json declaring the special as a move with `self_damage` + `invuln_frames` + `clears_surrounding_enemies`. Tagged `proposed_mechanic_tag: SelfDamagingDesperation` for main to promote cleanly.
SelfDamagingDesperation.what_promotion_would_unlock: first-class desperation-attack mechanic with self_damage + aoe_radius + invuln_window params instead of move-list convention.

BreakableEnvironmentObjects.currently_approximated_by: stages.json#breakable_props array + pickups.json#drop_spawns_in_breakable_props per-pickup. Runtime needs to implement breakable-prop destruction → pickup-spawn logic.
BreakableEnvironmentObjects.what_promotion_would_unlock: first-class breakable-prop mechanic with destructible_by_attack + destructible_by_throw + drop_resolver_ref params.
